description: Fired when the user submits the sign-up form with valid credentials.
Fired when a sign-up attempt fails due to an error returned by Clerk (e.g. email already in use, invalid password).
Fired on sign-up API error to capture the Clerk error details for exception monitoring.
Fired when the user successfully verifies their email address during sign-up.
Fired when a new user account is fully created and the sign-up flow is complete.
Fired when the user submits the sign-in form with valid credentials.
Fired when a sign-in attempt fails due to an error returned by Clerk (e.g. wrong password, account not found).
Fired on sign-in API error to capture the Clerk error details for exception monitoring.
Fired when the user successfully signs in and is redirected to the main app.
Fired when the user taps the Sign Out button on the Settings screen.
Fired when the user expands a subscription card on the Home screen to see more details. Includes subscription_id property.
Fired when the user collapses an expanded subscription card on the Home screen. Includes subscription_id property.
Fired when a user creates a new subscription from the Home screen modal. Includes subscription metadata properties.
Fired when the user expands a subscription card on the Home screen to see more details. Includes subscription_id property.
Fired when the subscription details screen is mounted for a specific subscription. Includes subscription_id property.
